title: lycopodium prostratum
intro: Lycopodium prostratum, also known as creeping forked club moss or creeping lycopodium, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the club moss family (Lycopodiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which help in relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Lycopodium prostratum include reducing coughs, relieving congestion, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy. Lycopodium prostratum can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
